item.title: Trading Day: Oil back above $100... and so?
item.description: Stocks rose, and bond yields and the dollar slipped on Tuesday, as investors shrugged off a rebound in oil prices that lifted Brent crude back above $100 a barrel, and turned their attention to the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision on Wednesday.

item.title: US securities regulator issues long-awaited crypto guidance
item.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on Tuesday issued an interpretation clarifying which types of cryptocurrencies are considered securities and how a "non-security" вҖӢdigital asset could meet certain conditions to become an investment contract.

item.title: Lululemon sees annual revenue, profit below estimates amid board, demand challenges
item.description: Athletic apparel вҖӢmaker Lululemon forecast 2026 revenue вҖҢand profit below Wall Street expectations on Tuesday, underscoring its challenges as it faces вҖӢrising competition and an attempt вҖӢby founder Chip Wilson to overhaul вҒ the board.

item.title: Nvidia sales opportunity for Blackwell, Rubin chips more than $1 trillion by 2027
item.description: Nvidia CEO вҖӢJensen Huang said вҖҢon Tuesday at a press conference вҖӢthat the revenue вҖӢopportunity for the company's вҒ Blackwell and вҖӢRubin artificial intelligence вҖӢchips is "likely to be larger than $1 trillion" by вҖӢthe end вҖӢof 2027. The estimate does вҖҢnot вҒ include the company's networking chips and the new вҖӢprocessors made вҖӢwith вҒ technology from the Groq вҖӢlicensing deal it вҖӢsigned вҒ in December.

item.title: Exclusive: Amazon CEO sees AI doubling prior AWS sales projections to $600 billion by 2036
item.description: Amazon O CEO Andy Jassy вҖӢsaid during an internal all-hands meeting вҖҢhe expects artificial intelligence could help cloud computing unit Amazon Web Services achieve $600 billion in annual sales, вҖӢdouble his own prior estimate.

item.title: Elon Musk, US SEC in talks to settle lawsuit over Twitter disclosures
item.description: Elon Musk and the вҖӢU.S. Securities and Exchange Commission are in вҖҢtalks to settle the regulator's lawsuit accusing the world's richest person of waiting too long to вҖӢdisclose his purchases of Twitter shares вҖӢin 2022.

item.title: Senator wants White House to answer if TikTok investors will pay $10 billion to US Treasury
item.description: The top Democrat on the Senate Intelligence вҖӢCommittee on Tuesday asked вҖҢthe White House to answer if investors are paying $10 вҖӢbillion to the вҖӢTreasury as part of the вҒ Trump administration-brokered sale вҖӢof TikTokвҖҷs U.S. operations.

item.title: Big drugmakers must face US overcharge claims on medications for low-income patients
item.description: A U.S. appeals court on вҖӢTuesday revived a whistleblower lawsuit accusing four large drugmakers of вҖҢdefrauding the federal and state governments out of hundreds of millions of dollars by overcharging on medications for low-income and uninsured patients.

item.title: Unicredit should clarify intentions for Commerzbank, German state premier says
item.description: The premier of the German state of Hesse on вҖӢTuesday called on Italy's UniCredit вҖҢto submit a concrete offer for the German lender Commerzbank and to clarify вҖӢits objectives.

item.title: Analysts revise AI hyperscaler debt forecasts after Amazon bond sale
item.description: Analysts anticipate a higher supply of debt being raised by вҖӢthe Big Five hyperscaler companies this year as they race to build out their data center вҖҢinfrastructure, following Amazon's near-record bond sale last week of roughly $54 billion in investment-grade bonds.

item.title: UBS faced technology outage that impacted trading business, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: UBS Group has вҖӢbeen working вҖҢto fix a вҖӢglobal вҖӢtechnology outage that impacted вҒ some вҖӢof its вҖӢtrading business, Bloomberg News reported вҖӢon вҖӢTuesday.

item.title: US stock market crash fears ease even as Middle East war rages on
item.description: Options traders' fears of a U.S. stock market crash have pulled вҖҢback nearly to levels seen before the U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran that made oil prices soar.

item.title: U.S. Democratic lawmakers introduce bill to crack down on prediction markets
item.description: U.S. Democratic lawmakers Senator Chris Murphy and Representative Greg Casar on Tuesday introduced вҖӢa bill to ban prediction market bets вҖҢon military operations and other sensitive government actions, increasing pressure on the fast-growing markets.

item.title: Baidu joins China's OpenClaw frenzy with new AI agents
item.description: Chinese tech giant Baidu on Tuesday unveiled a suite of artificial intelligence products, tapping growing domestic interest in OpenClaw, an open-source framework вҖӢfor agents that can perform complex tasks with less human input than вҖҢchatbots.

item.title: Kalshi criminallyВ charged in Arizona for operating illegal gambling business
item.description: Arizona's attorney general on Tuesday filed criminal charges against Kalshi, accusing the prediction market platform of operating an illegal gambling вҖӢbusiness in the state and unlawfully allowing people to place bets on elections.

item.title: Honeywell, Howmet juggle rising defense demand and commercial aerospace boom
item.description: Executives from Honeywell Aerospace and Howmet Aerospace вҖӢsaid on Tuesday they could grow capacity to meet strong commercial demand for вҖҢplane parts and munitions as the defense sector ramps up due to geopolitical strife.

item.title: Venezuela's PDVSA ratifies Asdrubal Chavez as head of US units including Citgo
item.description: The board of directors of Venezuela's state-run PDVSA this week вҖӢratified Asdrubal Chavez as head вҖҢof the oil company's U.S. subsidiaries PDV Holding, Citgo Holding and Citgo Petroleum, вҖӢa document seen by Reuters showed, вҖӢa decision that follows U.S. President вҒ Donald Trump's support of interim вҖӢPresident Delcy Rodriguez's administration.

item.title: Microsoft unifies Copilot commercial and consumer product teams in unit rejig
item.description: Microsoft said on Tuesday it вҖӢis reorganizing its вҖҢCopilot AI product teams by unifying вҖӢits commercial вҖӢand consumer versions, as вҒ the tech вҖӢgiant rushes to вҖӢimprove its AI assistant product and drive better вҖӢadoption.

item.title: GM, LG retool Tennessee battery plant for energy storage batteries, recall laid-off workers
item.description: General Motors and battery partner LG вҖӢEnergy Solution are transforming an electric-vehicle battery plant in Tennessee to вҖӢmake batteries for energy storage systems, the companies said Tuesday.

item.title: Boeing shareholders can pursue class action over 737 MAX safety
item.description: A federal judge вҖӢcertified a shareholder class action accusing Boeing of concealing safety deficiencies in вҖҢits 737 MAX planes before two crashes that killed 346 people in 2018 and 2019.

item.title: Debt investors offloading exposure to software companies is latest sign of pain
item.description: Investors are offloading software loans in debt vehicles at a discount, in the latest sign of pain in the software industry, which is being upended by AI.

item.title: Mastercard, Visa can appeal UK ruling that merchant fees breach antitrust law
item.description: Visa and Mastercard can challenge a judgment that found their вҖӢdefault multilateral interchange fees charged to вҖҢretailers infringe competition law, London's Court of Appeal ruled on Tuesday, in a long-running вҖӢlegal battle over the charges.

item.title: йҳҝж №е»·з»ҸжөҺйғЁй•ҝиЎЁзӨәпјҢдјҳжӯҘе°ҶеңЁжңӘжқҘдёүе№ҙеҶ…еҗ‘йҳҝж №е»·жҠ•иө„5дәҝзҫҺе…ғ
item.description: йҳҝж №е»·з»ҸжөҺйғЁй•ҝи·Ҝжҳ“ж–ҜВ·еҚЎжҷ®жүҳе‘ЁдәҢиЎЁзӨәпјҢзҪ‘зәҰиҪҰеә”з”ЁдјҳжӯҘе°ҶеңЁжңӘжқҘдёүе№ҙеҶ…еҗ‘йҳҝж №е»·жҠ•иө„5дәҝзҫҺе…ғгҖӮгҖҗеҺҹж–ҮпјҡRide-hailing application Uber вҖӢwill invest $500 вҖҢmillion in Argentina over вҖӢthe next вҖӢthree years, Economy вҒ Minister Luis вҖӢCaputo said вҖӢon Tuesday.гҖ‘

item.title: жіўйҹійў„и®Ўе•Ҷз”ЁйЈһжңәйғЁй—Ёзҡ„еҲ©ж¶ҰзҺҮе°ҶжҢҒе№іпјҢеҸҜиғҪе®һзҺ°зӣҲеҲ©
item.description: жіўйҹіе…¬еҸёйҰ–еёӯиҙўеҠЎе®ҳжқ°дјҠВ·й©¬жӢүз»ҙе‘ЁдәҢеңЁдјҰж•ҰдёҫиЎҢзҡ„зҫҺеӣҪй“¶иЎҢе…Ёзҗғе·ҘдёҡеӨ§дјҡдёҠиЎЁзӨәпјҢжіўйҹійў„и®Ўд»Ҡе№ҙе•Ҷз”ЁйЈһжңәйғЁй—Ёзҡ„еҲ©ж¶ҰзҺҮе°ҶжҢҒе№іпјҢжҲ–еҸҜиғҪе®һзҺ°еўһй•ҝгҖӮгҖҗеҺҹж–ҮпјҡBoeing is expecting flat or вҖҢpossibly positive margins this year for its commercial airplanes division, Boeing Chief Financial вҖӢOfficer Jay Malave said Tuesday вҖӢat the Bank of America Global вҒ Industrials Conference in London.гҖ‘

item.title: еҸ—жҠөжҠјиҙ·ж¬ҫеҲ©зҺҮдёӢйҷҚжҺЁеҠЁпјҢзҫҺеӣҪ2жңҲд»Ҫеҫ…е”®жҲҝеұӢж•°йҮҸж„ҸеӨ–еӣһеҚҮ
item.description: йҡҸзқҖжҠөжҠјиҙ·ж¬ҫеҲ©зҺҮдёӢйҷҚпјҢ2жңҲд»ҪзҫҺеӣҪзҺ°жҲҝиҙӯжҲҝеҗҲеҗҢж•°йҮҸж„ҸеӨ–еўһеҠ пјҢдҪҶдёӯдёңжҲҳдәӢжҺЁй«ҳжІ№д»·е№¶еҠ еү§йҖҡиғҖжӢ…еҝ§пјҢиҝҷеҸҜиғҪйҷҗеҲ¶еҗҺз»ӯж¶Ёе№…гҖӮгҖҗеҺҹж–ҮпјҡContracts to purchase previously owned U.S. homes unexpectedly increased in February amid a decline in mortgage rates, but further gains are likely to be limited by the вҖӢwar in the Middle East that is raising oil prices and fanning inflation вҖҢfears.гҖ‘

item.title: GSR acquires crypto advisory firms in $57 million expansion
item.description: Crypto trading firm and liquidity provider GSR is acquiring two digital asset advisory вҖӢfirms in a $57 million deal to become a "one вҖҢstop shop" crypto capital markets partner, the company said on Tuesday.

item.title: зҫҺеӣҪдј—и®®йҷўдәӨйҖҡе§”е‘ҳдјҡдё»еёӯжҸҗи®®еҫҒж”¶з”өеҠЁжұҪиҪҰиҙ№з”Ёз”ЁдәҺй«ҳйҖҹе…¬и·Ҝз»ҙдҝ®
item.description: дј—и®®йҷўдәӨйҖҡдёҺеҹәзЎҖи®ҫж–Ҫе§”е‘ҳдјҡдё»еёӯеёҢжңӣд»Һз”өеҠЁжұҪиҪҰеҫҒж”¶иө„йҮ‘пјҢз”ЁдәҺиө„еҠ©зҫҺеӣҪй«ҳйҖҹе…¬и·Ҝз»ҙдҝ®пјҢдҪңдёәең°йқўдәӨйҖҡжі•жЎҲзҡ„дёҖйғЁеҲҶгҖӮгҖҗеҺҹж–ҮпјҡThe chair of the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee wants to collect funds вҖӢfrom electric vehicles to help pay for U.S. highway repairs вҖҢas part of a surface transportation bill.гҖ‘

item.title: жҙІйҷ…дәӨжҳ“жүҖжҺЁеҮәз§ҒеӢҹдҝЎиҙ·е№іеҸ°пјҢд»Ҙи§ЈеҶійҖҸжҳҺеәҰй—®йўҳ
item.description: зәҪзәҰиҜҒеҲёдәӨжҳ“жүҖзҡ„жҜҚе…¬еҸёжҙІйҷ…дәӨжҳ“жүҖе‘ЁдәҢиЎЁзӨәпјҢе·ІжҺЁеҮәдёҖж¬ҫдә§е“ҒпјҢж—ЁеңЁжҸҗй«ҳз§ҒеӢҹдҝЎиҙ·еёӮеңәзҡ„йҖҸжҳҺеәҰвҖ”вҖ”иҝҷдёҖиө„дә§зұ»еҲ«жӯЈеӣ жҠ•иө„иҖ…жӢ…еҝ§еҠ еү§иҖҢеӨҮеҸ—еӣ°жү°гҖӮгҖҗеҺҹж–ҮпјҡNew York Stock Exchange-parent Intercontinental Exchange said on Tuesday it has launched a product to bring greater transparency to the private credit market, an asset вҖӢclass beleaguered by heightened investor concerns.гҖ‘

item.title: еңЁйҰ–еёӯжү§иЎҢе®ҳжҺЁеҠЁеӨҚе…ҙи®ЎеҲ’зҡ„иғҢжҷҜдёӢпјҢеҚЎеӨ«дәЁж°Ҹе°ҶжҺЁеҮәй«ҳиӣӢзҷҪиҠқеЈ«йҖҡеҝғзІү
item.description: еҚЎеӨ«дәЁж°Ҹе‘ЁдәҢиЎЁзӨәпјҢи®ЎеҲ’жҺЁеҮәй«ҳиӣӢзҷҪиҠқеЈ«йҖҡеҝғзІүпјҢиҝҷжҳҜйҰ–еёӯжү§иЎҢе®ҳеҸІи’ӮеӨ«В·еҚЎеёҢе…°дёәйҮҚжҢҜиҝҷе®¶еҢ…иЈ…йЈҹе“ҒеҲ¶йҖ е•ҶжүҖеҒҡеҠӘеҠӣзҡ„дёҖйғЁеҲҶпјҢжӯӨеүҚиҜҘе…¬еҸёе·ІжҡӮеҒңдәҶеҲҶжӢҶи®ЎеҲ’гҖӮгҖҗеҺҹж–ҮпјҡKraft Heinz said on Tuesday it вҖӢplans to launch high-protein Mac & Cheese as вҖҢpart of CEO Steve Cahillane's efforts to revive the packaged food maker after hitting pause on its plans вҖӢto split.гҖ‘

item.title: жҚ®гҖҠThe InformationгҖӢжҠҘйҒ“пјҢOpenAIе°ҶйҖҡиҝҮдәҡй©¬йҖҠдә‘жңҚеҠЎйғЁй—Ёеҗ‘зҫҺеӣҪж”ҝеәңжңәжһ„еҮәе”®дәәе·ҘжҷәиғҪжҠҖжңҜ
item.description: жҚ®гҖҠThe InformationгҖӢе‘ЁдәҢжҠҘйҒ“пјҢOpenAIе·ІзӯҫзҪІдёҖйЎ№ж–°еҚҸи®®пјҢе°ҶйҖҡиҝҮдәҡй©¬йҖҠзҡ„дә‘и®Ўз®—йғЁй—Ёеҗ‘зҫҺеӣҪеӣҪйҳІе’Ңж”ҝеәңжңәжһ„еҮәе”®е…¶дәәе·ҘжҷәиғҪжЁЎеһӢзҡ„дҪҝз”ЁжқғпјҢз”ЁдәҺеӨ„зҗҶжңәеҜҶе’ҢйқһжңәеҜҶе·ҘдҪңгҖӮгҖҗеҺҹж–ҮпјҡOpenAI has signed вҖӢa new deal to sell вҖҢaccess to its AI model to U.S. defense and government agencies вҖӢthrough Amazon's cloud unit вҖӢfor classified and unclassified work, the вҒ Information reported on Tuesday.гҖ‘
